ModMetaData.name: DUNE: Stillsuits
ModMetaData.author: HIGGS
ModMetaData.description:
[h1]Dune: Stillsuits[/h1]
[h3]This mod adds Stillsuits, best worn in desert biomes.[/h3]
How to Make: Research Requirement: Microelectronics Leather (anytype) : 200 Component: 2 Electric Tailoring Bench Hand Tailoring Bench
